beginner.title: Beginner Foundation
beginner.description: Focus on learning the movements and building consistency.

variations.title: Beginner: Momentum
variations.description: Great work! Keep refining your form with these key movements.

variations.title: Beginner: Shoulder Health
variations.description: We noticed shoulder feedback. Adjusting your foundation to protect your joints while you learn.

variations.title: Beginner: Core Stability
variations.description: Focusing on bracing and back safety to build a stronger foundation.

variations.title: Beginner: Knee Focus
variations.description: Adjusting squats to help you learn better knee tracking and stability.

variations.title: Beginner: Grip & Wrist
variations.description: Building wrist resilience to support your heavy lifts.

variations.title: Beginner: Grip Strength
variations.description: Focusing on holding strength to ensure you can finish your sets.

variations.title: Beginner: Arm Health
variations.description: Tending to your elbows while keeping the movement patterns consistent.

intermediate.title: Intermediate Strength
intermediate.description: Increase volume and add accessory movements.

variations.title: Intermediate: Progress
variations.description: Consistency is key. Pushing the volume to break through plateaus.

variations.title: Intermediate: Shoulder Support
variations.description: Managing shoulder load while maintaining high intensity.

variations.title: Intermediate: Back Recovery
variations.description: Swapping variations to allow the lower back to recover without missing a beat.

variations.title: Intermediate: Knee Tracking
variations.description: Building unilateral strength to fix imbalances affecting your knees.

variations.title: Intermediate: Wrist Support
variations.description: Optimizing grip and support for heavier loads.

variations.title: Intermediate: Grip Mastery
variations.description: Advanced grip techniques to ensure your back fails before your hands.

variations.title: Intermediate: Elbow Care
variations.description: Refining mechanics to reduce joint stress during heavy pulling/pushing.

variations.title: Advanced: Peak Performance
variations.description: Optimizing every rep for maximum strength and power output.

variations.title: Advanced: Joint Longevity
variations.description: Strategic deloading and prehab to maintain elite performance.

variations.title: Advanced: Posterior Chain
variations.description: Strengthening the posterior chain while managing central nervous system fatigue.

variations.title: Advanced: Knee Resilience
variations.description: Extreme stability work to protect your joints under maximal loads.

variations.title: Advanced: Precision Grip
variations.description: Specialized drills to ensure a rock-solid connection to the bar.

variations.title: Advanced: Hand Strength
variations.description: Maximal effort grip work for deadlifts and carries.

variations.title: Advanced: Tendon Health
variations.description: Eccentric training to build bulletproof tendons for heavy pressing.
